evals.name: unit-test-generation
evals.prompt: Write a Vitest unit test for the computeShipmentReadiness function in lib/services/scoring/index.ts.
evals.expected_output: A Vitest unit test file that mocks dependencies and tests multiple decision paths (go, conditional, no_go).

evals.name: e2e-test-generation
evals.prompt: Create a Playwright E2E test that verifies an admin can log in and view the shipments dashboard.
evals.expected_output: A Playwright spec file using the auth setup pattern and data-testid selectors.

evals.name: fixture-creation
evals.prompt: Create a test fixture for a Farmer profile with some custom metadata using the buildFarmer helper pattern.
evals.expected_output: A TypeScript fixture file with a default mock object and a buildFarmer helper function.
